target: 18. Searching for the Woman in Glasses
(I looked around the rest of the Kobayakawa house after that, but naturally, I couldn't find anyone.)

(After Shiomi-san called the police station,
I left the Kobayakawa house)
(I couldn't change what happened to the Kobayakawa family.)
(If I do nothing and let noon pass like this...)
(That woman I met on the ferry will be killed the same way again...)
(That person... she was trying to tell me something right before she died.)
(She knows something…)
(I might still be able to save her now.)
(This time, I haven't met her yet)
(I woke up at the harbor, and the events that followed played out differently from the previous loops.)
(Where did she go after getting off the ferry? How can I track her down...)
Check the inns
Ask around
(With that amount of luggage... she didn't seem like a day-tripper.)
(Alright, I'll check the inns)
(I visited the four inns on the island. Anminka, Nakamura, Tomaura, Uozumi...)
(And I managed to get some information from Nakamura-san, the owner of the Nakamura guesthouse.)
Wearing a suit... with long black hair, and glasses...
Well, ya see~~~. We've been getting a ton of guests every day lately.
Ain't there any other more obvious features?
Hmm… besides that…
She was super...! U-um... how do I put it... big!
Big...? Ah, her! Yeah, she was here! She definitely came by!!
(Th-That worked...?)
But she wasn't a guest stayin' over. It was yesterday evening, I think~ She came by our... cafe~!
You wanna drop by too, Shinpei-kun? The cafe~.
(Right, I remember now...)
(On July 23rd, the first time I died. Nakamura-san was at Kofune and said something strange...)
You said so yourself when I saw ya this morning!!
You know!! That you were lookin' for a busty woman with glasses!!
What?!
Are you sure that was me? You've been drinking too much in broad daylight, Nakamura-san!
(At the funeral, I was copied by Shiori-chan's Shadow.)
(That means the next day, my copied Shadow was looking for that woman.)
(My Shadow is also trying to figure out what she's doing...)
(It seems she really does hold the key to something.)
(But in the end, that woman wasn't staying anywhere, and I couldn't track her down.)
(I don't even know her name…)
(Is this my limit... on my own...?)
(Anyway, I'll try asking around. Someone must have seen her somewhere.)
(I went around to the cafe, the <color=#GF_TIPS_052>lighthouse</color>, Hitogashima Shrine, and so on, asking around.)
(And I managed to get one eyewitness account. Someone saw her walking toward the residential area last night...)
(Maybe she wasn't a tourist, but a relative of one of the islanders.)
(But I couldn't get any more information)
(Let alone track her down, I don't even know her name...)
(Is this my limit... on my own...?)
